title: Economic Growth & Stability
summary: Focuses on GDP growth, inflation control, and job creation strategies.
description: The economy remains the top priority for voters, with discussions ranging from tax reforms to the integration of AI in the workforce.

title: Public Health & Infrastructure
summary: Policies regarding medical access, insurance, and emergency preparedness.
description: Healthcare debates center on whether to maintain a private-public mix or transition towards a fully single-payer system.
